concept: My Brain Has Too Many Tabs Open
title: Funny 'Too Many Tabs Open' Shirt - Relatable Overthinking Meme Tee
description:
Is your brain basically Chrome with 57 tabs open and no clue where the music is coming from? This shirt gets it. Celebrate the chaos of modern overthinking and multitasking with this hilarious, ultra-relatable design. Because who doesn’t love a little #brainclutter humor? 

Perfect for:
- Overthinking champs and multitasking pros who never close a tab (literally or figuratively)
- Parents, students, and professionals juggling 100 things at once
- Gift-giving to that friend whose mental RAM is always full 

DETAILS:
- Printed design reads 'My Brain Has Too Many Tabs Open' in bold, witty typography with a quirky little browser tab doodle.
- Two print options: clean black or deep navy ink for light colors, or vibrant neon yellow and electric blue for dark colors.
- Made-to-order with premium inks, ensuring every shirt is uniquely yours.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
